title: Upcoming behavioral change: VOID columns included in Delta table reads
body:
In mid-June 2026, Delta Lake will fully support [`VOID`](/aws/en/sql/language-manual/data-types/null-type) columns. Previously, `VOID` columns were silently skipped by path-based DataFrame reads (for example, `spark.read.format("delta").load(path)`) and time travel queries. After this change, these queries include `VOID` columns in the output.

Queries that depend on column count or position, such as `INSERT INTO ... SELECT *`, may fail or produce incorrect results after this change. Review any queries that read from Delta Lake tables with `VOID` columns to ensure they handle the additional columns correctly.

See [`VOID` type](/aws/en/sql/language-manual/data-types/null-type).
